activities_projects.title: Observing Vibrations
activities_projects.objective: Understand that sound is produced by vibrations
steps: Strike a tuning fork and place its base in water
Observe water surface for ripples
Write observations
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Identifies vibrations as the source of sound

activities_projects.title: Making Sound with Strings
activities_projects.objective: Observe sound produced by stretched strings
steps: Stretch rubber bands over a box or ruler
Pluck each rubber band and listen
Note differences in pitch for thick and thin bands
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands effect of tension, thickness, and length on sound

activities_projects.title: Pitch of Sound
activities_projects.objective: Identify high and low pitch sounds
steps: Play different sounds from instruments
Classify them as high-pitched or low-pitched
Record observations

activities_projects.title: Loudness of Sound
steps: Strike a tuning fork softly and then harder
Observe the difference in loudness
Note the relation between amplitude and loudness
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Relates amplitude of vibrations to loudness

activities_projects.title: Sound Propagation in Solids, Liquids, and Air
activities_projects.objective: Observe how sound travels through different media
steps: Strike a tuning fork and place it on the table; listen with ear touching table
Place it in water and observe vibrations
Compare sound heard in air, solid, and liquid
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands that sound needs a medium to travel

activities_projects.title: Echo Observation
materials: Open space near wall or cliff
steps: Shout towards a wall or cliff
Listen for echo
Note the time taken for echo to return

activities_projects.title: Making a Simple Sound Source
steps: Stretch a rubber band over a cup
Pluck the band and observe the sound produced
Vary the tension to see effect on sound
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Connects vibration of objects to sound production

activities_projects.title: Finding Direction of Sound
activities_projects.objective: Understand how sound travels in all directions
steps: Blindfold a student and produce sound from different directions
Ask the student to identify the direction
Record observations
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Learns sound propagates in all directions

activities_projects.title: Comparing Speed of Sound in Air, Water, and Solids
activities_projects.objective: Observe relative speed of sound in different media
steps: Strike a tuning fork and place ear on table (solid), in air, and near water surface
Compare loudness and arrival of sound
Record which medium transmits sound faster
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands speed of sound varies with medium

activities_projects.title: Varying Frequency and Pitch
activities_projects.objective: Observe effect of frequency on pitch
materials: Tuning forks of different frequencies or musical app
steps: Strike tuning forks of different frequencies
Listen to difference in pitch
Record relation between frequency and pitch
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Connects frequency of vibration to pitch of sound
